title: Bitter Crunchy Korean Kale Salad
description: A refreshing, egg-free Korean kale salad that balances bitter greens with crunchy toasted mustard seeds and a zingy sesame sauce.
instructions: Bring salted water to a rolling boil in a large pot.
Add the chopped kale and blanch for 30 seconds, then immediately transfer to an ice bath to stop the cooking.
Drain the kale, pat dry, and cut into bite‑sized pieces.
In a small dry skillet, toast the mustard seeds over medium heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes; add gochugaru and toast for an additional 30 seconds.
Whisk together sesame oil, rice vinegar, sea salt, and black pepper in a bowl to make the dressing.
Toss the blanched kale with the toasted mustard seeds and gochugaru, then drizzle the dressing over the salad and mix until evenly coated.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and, if using, sliced green onions over the top.
Serve immediately for the best crunch and flavor.
